case_title: VICTORIA, GARY et al VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ALL PLAINTIFFS SETTLED WITH DEFENDANT OR WERE PREVIOUSLY DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COURT ORDER TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT PURSUANT TO PLTF'S REQUEST FROM CIVIL DIVISION CASE # 191687.
DISMISSAL FILED BY WM. J. DONNELLY,ESQ. SUBMITTEDQ TO COURT. DONNELLY IS NOT A PARTY TO ACTION, THEREFOR, CAN NOT DISMISS ANY PARTY IN ACTION
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-16-2002, OFF CALENDAR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VICTORIA, GARY GRAYS, NADINE LAURENCE, ADRIAN (A MINOR) LAURENCE, AARON (A MINOR) LAURENCE, AIDEN (A MINOR) LAURENCE, JAMES (GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINORS) AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
